title: CCDR: Volume 48-11/12, November/December 2022: Antimicrobial Use and Stewardship - Canada.ca
content:
## CCDR: Volume 48-11/12, November/December 2022: Antimicrobial Use and Stewardship
- Information for authors
Editorial Short-course antibiotic therapy: The next frontier in antimicrobial stewardship D Sheppard
Commentary Moving the needle on dental antibiotic overuse in Canada post COVID-19 S Sutherland, K Born, S Singhal
Overview The Canadian Nosocomial Infection Surveillance Program: Keeping an eye on antimicrobial resistance in Canadian hospitals since 1995 Canadian Nosocomial Infection Surveillance Program
Antibiotic prescribing and antimicrobial stewardship in long-term care facilities: Past interventions and implementation challenges N Vyas, T Good, J Cila, M Morrissey, D Gravel Tropper
Overview of Canada's Antimicrobial Resistance Network (AMRNet): A data-driven One Health approach to antimicrobial resistance surveillance W Rudnick, SN Mukhi, RJ Reid-Smith, GJ German, A Nichani, MR Mulvey, the Canadian Public Health Laboratory Network Antimicrobial Resistance Working Group, and the Canadian Animal Health Laboratorians Network Antimicrobial Susceptibility Testing Working Group
Hospital and related resource costs associated with antimicrobial-resistant infections in Canada, 2019 A Diener, H Wang, M Nkangu
National Hepatitis C estimates: Incidence, prevalence, undiagnosed proportion and treatment, Canada, 2019 N Popovic, A Williams, S Périnet, L Campeau, Q Yang, F Zhang, P Yan, J Feld, N Janjua, M Klein, M Krajden, W Wong, J Cox
Survey Report Understanding Canadians' knowledge, attitudes and practices related to antimicrobial resistance and antibiotic use: Results from public opinion research A-L Crago, S Alexandre, K Abdesselam, D Gravel Tropper, M Hartmann, G Smith, T Lary
Prevalence of antimicrobial-resistant organisms in smaller Canadian hospitals: Community, Rural, and Northern Acute Care Point Prevalence (CNAPP-19) Survey, 2019 S Thomas, D Gravel Tropper, B Knight, D Sheppard, T Lary, J Mackenzie, G German, C Frenette, K Bush, J Ellison, J Happe, J Shurgold
Surveillance Antimicrobial susceptibilities of Neisseria gonorrhoeae in Canada, 2020 R Thorington, P Sawatzky, B Lefebvre, M Diggle, L Hoang, S Patel, P Van Caessele, J Minion, R Garceau, M Matheson, D Haldane, G Gravel, MR Mulvey, I Martin
Advisory Committee Statement Summary of the National Advisory Committee on Immunization (NACI) Rapid Response: Updated interim guidance on Imvamune in the context of ongoing monkeypox outbreaks N Forbes, O Baclic, R Harrison, N Brousseau on behalf of the National Advisory Committee on Immunization (NACI)
Infographic Infectious syphilis and congenital syphilis in Canada, 2021
Letter to the Editor Response to letter: "Circular logic and flawed modelling compromises non-pharmaceutical intervention paper's conclusions" NH Ogden, P Turgeon, A Fazil, J Clark, V Gabriele-Rivet, T Tam, V Ng
COVID Brief Is there protective immunity after an Omicron infection?
Appreciation Thank you to the CCDR peer reviewers of 2022
